basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website of Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara. A total of 2 MBBS Doctor vacancies have been announced through the Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years Retired doctors can work up to 70 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from MCI recognized Medical College of India, Registered Medical Practitioner
qualification.details: MBBS Degree from MCI recognized Medical College of India. He/She should be a Registered Medical Practitioner.

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.ordnance_factory_hospital_bhandara: MBBS Degree from MCI recognized Medical College of India, Registered Medical Practitioner

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS Degree from MCI recognized Medical College of India. He/She should be a Registered Medical Practitioner.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years Retired doctors can work up to 70 years.

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Hospital MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the MBBS Doctor post at Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara is scheduled for 23rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the MBBS Doctor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the MBBS Doctor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from an MCI-recognized Medical College in India and be a Registered Medical Practitioner.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the MBBS Doctor post is 70 years. Retired doctors are eligible to apply up to this age.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the MBBS Doctor position at Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Hospital Bhandara is located in Bhandara, Maharashtra, with the pincode 441906.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
